flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at High Point University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.8k → $45.3k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at High Point University rose 14% between 2021 and 2024 ($39.8k → $45.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at High Point University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at High Point University are 34% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($61.4k vs $45.7k).
